title: MetaboLights: open data repository for metabolomics.
author: Yurekten O Payne T Tejera N Amaladoss FX Martin C Williams M O'Donovan C
content: S-EPMC10767962 PMC10767962 MetaboLights: open data repository for metabolomics. MetaboLights is a global database for metabolomics studies including the raw experimental data and the associated metadata. The database is cross-species and cross-technique and covers metabolite structures
